title: taraxacum breviscapum
intro: Taraxacum breviscapum, also known as the common dandelion or Asian dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to promote blood circulation and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Taraxacum breviscapum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Taraxacum breviscapum can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
